confidence_rule: high if matches GL company_name verbatim

business_definition: Phase / plat label normalized per pipelines/config.py:normalize_phase
source_columns_by_schema: inventory: phase; LotData: Phase; 2025Status: Phase; clickup: phase
confidence_rule: high if 2+ of {inventory; Lot Data; 2025Status} carry it; medium if 1; low if ClickUp-only
notes: Phase is empty (0% fill) in all GL source schemas; cannot derive phase from GL.

business_definition: Opaque blake2s-8 hash of (canonical_project | canonical_phase | canonical_lot_number)
source_candidates: inventory.canonical_lot_id (computed at stage); recomputed for other sources at canonical-table build
confidence_rule: inherits worst-link of project_confidence and phase confidence and lot source
notes: Stable across runs (deterministic hash)

business_definition: Lot identifier within phase (normalized: strip whitespace + .0 + leading zeros from numeric prefix)
source_columns_by_schema: inventory: lot_num; LotData: LotNo.; 2025Status: Lot; clickup: lot_num; gl_v2: lot
confidence_rule: high if appears in inventory + at least one of {ClickUp; GL; LotData}
notes: GL VF lot codes encode phase+lot for some projects; v0 normalizer strips zeros only; v1 follow-up adds phase decoder.

confidence_rule: high if from inventory; medium if cross-checked with ClickUp status
notes: ACTIVE = INVENTORY-tab row; CLOSED = CLOSED-tab row with closing_date <= as_of; ACTIVE_PROJECTED = CLOSED-tab row with closing_date > as_of (forward-projected)

business_definition: Vertical-builder customer who builds the home (BCP / Lennar / EXT / etc.)
notes: BCP = BCPD-built. Filter HorzCustomer=BCP for in-scope.

business_definition: Horizontal developer entity that develops the lot (BCPD / BCPBL / ASD / BCPI)
notes: Horizontal-developer attribution; affects which workbook holds the allocation budget.

business_definition: Canonical lifecycle stage from v1 LOT_STATE_WATERFALL
source_columns_by_schema: derived from date fields per pipelines/config.py:LOT_STATE_WATERFALL

notes: Drives completion_pct via LOT_STATE_TO_PCT_COMPLETE

notes: DR consumers MUST dedup before summing. See guardrail_check_v0.md DataRails dedup decision.
